_comment: n8n Workflow Template: Daily Keyword Rank Tracker
_description: Tracks keyword positions daily via Appeeky API, stores history, alerts on significant changes (+/- 10 positions)
_setup: 1. Import into n8n. 2. Set APPEEKY_API_KEY. 3. Configure storage (Supabase/Google Sheets). 4. Set alert webhook.
name: Daily Keyword Rank Tracker
